pi_items.source: File found at /examples/equest_env/data/4StoreyBuilding.inp; confirmed by grep of HVAC system names

Verified by examining actual system names in 4StoreyBuilding.inp (grep output shows 'Sys1 (PSZ) (T.S31)', 'Sys1 (PSZ) (T.E32)', 'Sys1 (PSZ) (T.N33)', 'Sys1 (PSZ) (T.W34)', 'Sys1 (PSZ) (T.C35)'); corroborated by top_floor_rtu_efficiency_upgrade task.json using same building with 'target_floor': 'T' and top_floor_thermal_mass_update task.json using 'target_floor_prefix': 'T'

Grep of 4StoreyBuilding.inp shows exactly 5 systems with T prefix: T.S31, T.E32, T.N33, T.W34, T.C35; corroborated by top_floor_thermal_mass_update task stating '5 spaces: South, East, North, West, and Core'
Valid eQUEST parameter; value consistent with ASHRAE 90.1 outdoor air requirements for commercial buildings; not currently set in 4StoreyBuilding.inp (no MIN-OUTSIDE-AIR entries found in grep)
Valid eQUEST RECOVER-EXHAUST parameter value; enables exhaust air recovery in HVAC systems; not currently set in 4StoreyBuilding.inp (no RECOVER-EXHAUST entries found)
Valid eQUEST parameter; ENTHALPY is a standard ERV-RECOVER-TYPE option for enthalpy recovery wheels; confirmed by web search of eQUEST documentation references

Valid eQUEST parameter for sensible effectiveness ratio; 0.76 (76%) is typical for enthalpy wheel ERV systems; web search confirms eQUEST documentation references ERV-SENSIBLE-EFF = 0.76 as default value for ENTHALPY-WHEEL

Valid eQUEST parameter for latent effectiveness ratio; 0.65 (65%) is reasonable for enthalpy wheel ERV systems; web search documentation indicates ERV-LATENT-EFF values typically range 0.65-0.74 for enthalpy wheels
Confirmed by task description ('run the annual simulation'), verifier.py logic (checks sim_file_is_new and awards 10pts for simulation execution), and task.json success criteria

privileged_info_summary: The ventilation_erv_upgrade task targets the 4StoreyBuilding eQUEST model with 5 HVAC systems. The metadata incorrectly identifies the floor prefix as '3.' when the actual system prefix is 'T' (representing the top/3rd floor). All five systems (T.S31, T.E32, T.N33, T.W34, T.C35) are located in the real 4StoreyBuilding.inp file. The task requires setting target values: MIN-OUTSIDE-AIR=0.30, RECOVER-EXHAUST=YES, ERV-RECOVER-TYPE=ENTHALPY, ERV-SENSIBLE-EFF=0.76, ERV-LATENT-EFF=0.65, followed by simulation execution. These are all valid eQUEST parameters with standard, well-documented typical values.
